changes: Generator spawns randomly on random board slots (FindEmptyCell returns random)

Quest variety: tiered chain access (1-20 Garden, 21-50 Garden/Wood, 51-100 balanced)
Level/amount ramping improved, gems only early + milestones
Fill-board button (📦) costs rows*cols*10 gems, spawns random unlocked items
